title: Excalibur | Just Enough Items (JEI) Support
description: Excalibur Support for Just Enough Items (JEI) and addons
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) and it's addons seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

Looking for compatibility with a specific mod? Drop your requests in the Discord server — JEI-related only! 

**Features:**
- Redesigned all GUIs and elements

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
- mezz - Creator of _Just Enough Items_
- way2muchnoise - Creator of _Just Enough Resources_
- Mrbysco - Creator of _Just Enough Professions_
- Abyssal_Kutku - Previous JEI 1.19.2 Support

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-jei-support)
